```{r manhattan_plot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height=8, fig.width=16, dev='png', dpi=320}
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 9),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.box = "horizontal",
      # Add some padding to axes titles
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10))
    )
  
  return(p)
})

# Display plots
manhattan_plots[[1]]
manhattan_plots[[2]]

# Save plots
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(outliers_dir, "manhattan_malignant_prevalence.png"),
  plot = manhattan_plots[[1]],
  width = 16, 
  height = 8, 
  dpi = 320, 
  dev = "png"
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(outliers_dir, "manhattan_neoplasia_prevalence.png"),
  plot = manhattan_plots[[2]],
  width = 16, 
  height = 8, 
  dpi = 320, 
  dev = "png"
)
```

# Generate per-criteria Manhattan plots
This section creates Manhattan plots showing the CAAS density after removing positions based on each declustering parameter, allowing visualization of the impact of each filtering criterion.
```{r manhattan_by_parameters_windows, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height=15, fig.width=18, dev='png', dpi=320}
param_cols <- names(param_names)
traits <- c('malignant_prevalence','neoplasia_prevalence')
build_after_param <- function(trait, pname) {
  pattern <- param_names[[pname]]
  orig <- bind_rows(setup_dfs[grepl(trait, names(setup_dfs))], .id = 'src') %>%
    mutate(GenePos = paste(Gene, Position, sep = '@')) %>%
    distinct(GenePos, Gene, Position)

  matching <- cluster_dfs[grepl(pattern, names(cluster_dfs)) & grepl(trait, names(cluster_dfs))]
  discarded_pos <- character(0)
  if (length(matching) > 0) {
    discarded_pos <- unique(unlist(lapply(matching, function(df) {
      df %>%
        filter(ClusteringFlag == 'Discarded') %>%
        mutate(GenePos = paste(Gene, Position, sep='@')) %>%
        pull(GenePos)
    }), use.names = FALSE))
  }

  retained <- orig %>%
    mutate(discarded = GenePos %in% discarded_pos) %>%
    filter(!discarded) %>%
    group_by(Gene) %>%
    summarise(n_retained = n(), .groups = 'drop')

  gene_meta <- df_all_annotated %>%
    filter(Trait == trait) %>%
    distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(Gene, Length, Extreme, Dubious, n_CAAS_per_length)

  trait_genes <- orig %>%
    distinct(Gene) %>%
    left_join(gene_meta, by = 'Gene') %>%
    mutate(
      Extreme = replace_na(Extreme, FALSE),
      Dubious = replace_na(Dubious, FALSE),
      Length = as.numeric(Length),
      n_CAAS_per_length = as.numeric(n_CAAS_per_length)
    ) %>%
    mutate(Category = case_when(
      Extreme & Dubious ~ 'Both',
      Extreme ~ 'Extreme',
      Dubious ~ 'Dubious',
      TRUE ~ 'Normal'
    )) %>%
    mutate(Category = factor(Category, levels = category_levels))

  df <- trait_genes %>%
    left_join(retained, by = 'Gene') %>%
    mutate(n_retained = replace_na(n_retained, 0)) %>%
    mutate(RemovalStatus = if_else(n_retained == 0, 'Removed by window', 'Retained')) %>%
    left_join(genomic_info %>% select(gene, chr, start, end), by = c('Gene' = 'gene')) %>%
    mutate(pos = ifelse(!is.na(start) & !is.na(end), (start + end)/2, NA_real_)) %>%
    mutate(
      density_filtered = ifelse(!is.na(Length) & Length > 0, 100 * n_retained / Length, NA_real_),
      density_original = n_CAAS_per_length,
      plot_density_original = case_when(
        is.na(density_original) ~ NA_real_,
        density_original <= 0 ~ min_density_display,
        TRUE ~ density_original
      ),
      plot_density_filtered = case_when(
        is.na(density_filtered) ~ NA_real_,
        density_filtered <= 0 ~ min_density_display,
        TRUE ~ density_filtered
      ),
      display_group = case_when(
        RemovalStatus == 'Removed by window' ~ 'Removed by window',
        RemovalStatus == 'Retained' ~ as.character(Category),
        TRUE ~ RemovalStatus
      ),
      display_group = factor(display_group, levels = manhattan_color_levels)
    ) %>%
    mutate(Parameter = pname, Trait = trait) %>%
    select(Trait, Parameter, Gene, chr, pos, n_retained, Length,
           density_original, density_filtered,
           plot_density_original, plot_density_filtered,
           Category, display_group, RemovalStatus)

  df
}

for (tr in traits) {
  manh_params <- map_dfr(param_cols, function(pn) build_after_param(tr, pn)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(chr) & !is.na(pos)) %>%
    mutate(Parameter = factor(Parameter, levels = param_cols))

  chr_layout <- manh_params %>%
    select(chr, pos) %>%
    compute_chr_layout()
  manh_params <- apply_chr_layout(manh_params, chr_layout)
  axis_data <- chr_layout %>% select(chr_num, chr_center)

  p <- ggplot(manh_params, aes(x = BPcum, y = plot_density_original,
                               color = display_group, shape = display_group)) +
    geom_vline(
      data = chr_layout %>% filter(chr_start > 0),
      aes(xintercept = chr_start),
      color = 'gray60', linetype = 'dashed', linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_point(aes(alpha = display_group), size = 2, stroke = 0.8) +
    scale_alpha_manual(
      values = c(
        "Normal" = 0.15,
        "Dubious" = 0.85,
        "Extreme" = 0.85,
        "Both" = 0.85,
        "Removed by window" = 1,
        "Removed (Extreme)" = 1,
        "Removed (Dubious cluster)" = 1
      ),
      guide = "none"
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "Normal" = 1.4,
        "Dubious" = 1.8,
        "Extreme" = 1.8,
        "Both" = 1.8,
        "Removed by window" = 2.6,
        "Removed (Extreme)" = 2.8,
        "Removed (Dubious cluster)" = 2.8
      ),
      guide = 'none'
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = manhattan_color_map,
                       breaks = manhattan_color_levels,
                       drop = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shape_map,
                       breaks = shape_levels,
                       drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = axis_data$chr_num,
                       breaks = axis_data$chr_center,
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.005, 0.005))) +
    scale_y_log10(
      breaks = c(0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10),
      labels = c('0.01', '0.05', '0.1', '0.5', '1', '2', '5', '10'),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ Parameter, nrow = 3, scales = 'fixed') +
    labs(
      title = sprintf('Manhattan: %s (per-parameter window filtering)', tr),
      x = 'Chromosome',
      y = 'CAAS per Gene Length (%)',
      color = 'Category / removal',
      shape = 'Category / removal',
      caption = 'Crosses denote genes where the window filter removed every CAAS (displayed at ~0.008%).'
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = 'top',
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 0.2)
    )

  print(p)

  out_file <- file.path(outliers_dir, sprintf('manhattan_parameters_%s.png', gsub('[^A-Za-z0-9]', '_', tolower(tr))))
  ggsave(filename = out_file, plot = p, width = 18, height = 14, dpi = 320)
  cat(sprintf('Saved per-parameter manhattan for %s -> %s\n', tr, out_file))
}
```

```{r manhattan_parameters_by_approach, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height=8, fig.width=18, dev='png', dpi=320}
# For each approach (i, ii) and trait, plot per-parameter Manhattan after applying that approach's filtering
approaches <- c('Approach i', 'Approach ii')
param_cols <- names(param_names)
traits <- c('malignant_prevalence','neoplasia_prevalence')

apply_param_with_approach <- function(trait, pname, approach) {
  pattern <- param_names[[pname]]
  orig <- bind_rows(setup_dfs[grepl(trait, names(setup_dfs))], .id = 'src') %>%
    mutate(GenePos = paste(Gene, Position, sep = '@')) %>%
    distinct(GenePos, Gene, Position)

  matching <- cluster_dfs[grepl(pattern, names(cluster_dfs)) & grepl(trait, names(cluster_dfs))]
  discarded_pos <- character(0)
  if (length(matching) > 0) {
    discarded_pos <- unique(unlist(lapply(matching, function(df) {
      df %>%
        filter(ClusteringFlag == 'Discarded') %>%
        mutate(GenePos = paste(Gene, Position, sep='@')) %>%
        pull(GenePos)
    }), use.names = FALSE))
  }

  gene_meta <- df_all_annotated %>%
    filter(Trait == trait) %>%
    distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(Gene, Length, Extreme, Dubious, n_CAAS_per_length)

  gene_flags <- gene_meta %>% select(Gene, Extreme, Dubious)

  dubious_with_clusters <- character(0)
  if (length(discarded_pos) > 0) {
    dubious_with_clusters <- orig %>%
      filter(GenePos %in% discarded_pos) %>%
      inner_join(gene_flags %>% filter(Dubious) %>% select(Gene), by = 'Gene') %>%
      distinct(Gene) %>%
      pull(Gene)
  }

  kept <- orig %>% mutate(discarded = GenePos %in% discarded_pos) %>% filter(!discarded)

  extreme_genes <- gene_flags %>% filter(Extreme) %>% pull(Gene)
  if (approach == 'Approach i') {
    kept <- kept %>% filter(!(Gene %in% extreme_genes))
  }
  if (length(dubious_with_clusters) > 0) {
    kept <- kept %>% filter(!(Gene %in% dubious_with_clusters))
  }

  retained <- kept %>% group_by(Gene) %>% summarise(n_retained = n(), .groups = 'drop')

  trait_genes <- orig %>%
    distinct(Gene) %>%
    left_join(gene_meta, by = 'Gene') %>%
    mutate(
      Extreme = replace_na(Extreme, FALSE),
      Dubious = replace_na(Dubious, FALSE),
      Length = as.numeric(Length),
      n_CAAS_per_length = as.numeric(n_CAAS_per_length)
    ) %>%
    mutate(Category = case_when(
      Extreme & Dubious ~ 'Both',
      Extreme ~ 'Extreme',
      Dubious ~ 'Dubious',
      TRUE ~ 'Normal'
    )) %>%
    mutate(Category = factor(Category, levels = category_levels))

  df <- trait_genes %>%
    left_join(retained, by = 'Gene') %>%
    mutate(n_retained = replace_na(n_retained, 0)) %>%
    mutate(RemovalStatus = case_when(
      approach == 'Approach i' & Gene %in% extreme_genes ~ 'Removed (Extreme)',
      Gene %in% dubious_with_clusters ~ 'Removed (Dubious cluster)',
      n_retained == 0 ~ 'Removed by window',
      TRUE ~ 'Retained'
    )) %>%
    left_join(genomic_info %>% select(gene, chr, start, end), by = c('Gene' = 'gene')) %>%
    mutate(pos = ifelse(!is.na(start) & !is.na(end), (start + end)/2, NA_real_)) %>%
    mutate(
      density_filtered = ifelse(!is.na(Length) & Length > 0, 100 * n_retained / Length, NA_real_),
      density_original = n_CAAS_per_length,
      plot_density_original = case_when(
        is.na(density_original) ~ NA_real_,
        density_original <= 0 ~ min_density_display,
        TRUE ~ density_original
      ),
      plot_density_filtered = case_when(
        is.na(density_filtered) ~ NA_real_,
        density_filtered <= 0 ~ min_density_display,
        TRUE ~ density_filtered
      ),
      display_group = case_when(
        RemovalStatus == 'Retained' ~ as.character(Category),
        TRUE ~ RemovalStatus
      ),
      display_group = factor(display_group, levels = manhattan_color_levels)
    ) %>%
    mutate(Parameter = pname, Trait = trait, Approach = approach) %>%
    select(Trait, Approach, Parameter, Gene, chr, pos, n_retained, Length,
           density_original, density_filtered,
           plot_density_original, plot_density_filtered,
           Category, display_group, RemovalStatus)

  df
}

for (approach in approaches) {
  for (tr in traits) {
    manh_df <- map_dfr(param_cols, function(pn) apply_param_with_approach(tr, pn, approach)) %>%
      filter(!is.na(chr) & !is.na(pos)) %>%
      mutate(Parameter = factor(Parameter, levels = param_cols))

    chr_layout <- manh_df %>% select(chr, pos) %>% compute_chr_layout()
    manh_df <- apply_chr_layout(manh_df, chr_layout)
    axis_data <- chr_layout %>% select(chr_num, chr_center)

    p <- ggplot(manh_df, aes(x = BPcum, y = plot_density_original,
                             color = display_group, shape = display_group)) +
      geom_vline(
        data = chr_layout %>% filter(chr_start > 0),
        aes(xintercept = chr_start),
        color = 'gray60', linetype = 'dashed', linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.7
      ) +
    geom_point(aes(alpha = display_group, size = display_group), stroke = 0.65) +
    scale_alpha_manual(
      values = c(
        "Normal" = 0.15,
        "Dubious" = 0.85,
        "Extreme" = 0.85,
        "Both" = 0.85,
        "Removed by window" = 1,
        "Removed (Extreme)" = 1,
        "Removed (Dubious cluster)" = 1
      ),
      guide = 'none'
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "Normal" = 1.4,
        "Dubious" = 1.8,
        "Extreme" = 1.8,
        "Both" = 1.8,
        "Removed by window" = 2.6,
        "Removed (Extreme)" = 2.8,
        "Removed (Dubious cluster)" = 2.8
      ),
      guide = 'none'
    ) +
      scale_color_manual(values = manhattan_color_map,
                         breaks = manhattan_color_levels,
                         drop = FALSE) +
      scale_shape_manual(values = shape_map,
                         breaks = shape_levels,
                         drop = FALSE) +
      scale_x_continuous(labels = axis_data$chr_num,
                         breaks = axis_data$chr_center,
                         expand = expansion(mult = c(0.005, 0.005))) +
      scale_y_log10(
        breaks = c(0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10),
        labels = c('0.01','0.05','0.1','0.5','1','2','5','10'),
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))
      ) +
      facet_wrap(~ Parameter, nrow = 3, scales = 'fixed') +
      labs(
        title = sprintf('Manhattan: %s — %s', tr, approach),
        x = 'Chromosome',
        y = 'CAAS per Gene Length (%)',
        color = 'Category / removal',
        shape = 'Category / removal',
        caption = "Crosses indicate genes removed by window (blue), Extreme (orange) or Dubious cluster (teal); placed at ~0.008%."
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(legend.position = 'top', axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9))

    print(p)
    out_file <- file.path(outliers_dir, sprintf('manhattan_%s_%s.png', tolower(gsub(' ', '_', approach)), gsub('[^A-Za-z0-9]', '_', tolower(tr))))
    ggsave(filename = out_file, plot = p, width = 18, height = 14, dpi = 320)
    cat(sprintf('Saved %s -> %s\n', paste(tr, approach, sep=' - '), out_file))
  }
}
```

### 8.2. Chromosomal Impact Analysis

This section visualizes the impact of filtering on each chromosome by comparing the CAAS density of removed genes to the chromosome baseline.

```{r chr_impact, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=12, dev='png', dpi=320}
cat("\n=== Combined Chromosomal Impact ===\n")
cat("Chromosomes most affected by filtering (extreme + dubious genes):\n")
cat("Note: mean_density here = average CAAS density of REMOVED genes only\n")
cat("      Compare to chromosome median_density in chromosome_summary.tsv\n")
cat("      to validate these were true outliers.\n\n")

# Combine extreme and all dubious genes by chromosome (keep Trait column)
all_removed_genes <- bind_rows(
  extreme_genes %>% 
    filter(chr != "unknown") %>%
    select(chr, Gene, Trait, n_CAAS_per_length) %>%
    mutate(Reason = "Extreme"),
  bind_rows(
    read_tsv(file.path(removed_dir, "malignant_prevalence_dubious_genes_with_clusters.tsv"), 
             show_col_types = FALSE) %>% mutate(Trait = "malignant_prevalence"),
    read_tsv(file.path(removed_dir, "neoplasia_prevalence_dubious_genes_with_clusters.tsv"), 
             show_col_types = FALSE) %>% mutate(Trait = "neoplasia_prevalence")
  ) %>%
    filter(chr != "unknown") %>%
    select(chr, Gene, Trait, n_CAAS_per_length) %>%
    mutate(Reason = "Dubious")
)

# Group by BOTH chr and Trait
chr_impact_by_trait <- all_removed_genes %>%
  group_by(chr, Trait) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n(),
    n_extreme = sum(Reason == "Extreme"),
    n_dubious = sum(Reason == "Dubious"),
    mean_density = mean(n_CAAS_per_length, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Also create combined (across traits) for saving
chr_impact_combined <- all_removed_genes %>%
  group_by(chr) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n(),
    n_extreme = sum(Reason == "Extreme"),
    n_dubious = sum(Reason == "Dubious"),
    mean_density = mean(n_CAAS_per_length, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_genes))

print(chr_impact_combined %>% head(10))

# Save combined impact
write_tsv(chr_impact_combined, file.path(removed_dir, "chromosomal_impact_summary.tsv"))
write_tsv(all_removed_genes, file.path(removed_dir, "all_removed_genes.tsv"))

cat("\nFiles saved:\n")
cat("  - chromosomal_impact_summary.tsv (per-chromosome statistics)\n")
cat("  - all_removed_genes.tsv (complete list with reasons)\n")

# Function to create plot for one trait (chr_summary already loaded above)
create_chr_impact_plot <- function(trait_name, trait_label) {
  # Get top 15 chromosomes for this trait
  trait_data <- chr_impact_by_trait %>%
    filter(Trait == trait_name) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_genes)) %>%
    head(15) %>%
    mutate(chr_num = gsub("^chr", "", chr))  # Strip "chr" prefix
  
  # Merge with baseline from chr_summary (already loaded above)
  trait_baseline <- chr_summary %>%
    filter(Trait == trait_name) %>%
    select(chr_num, median_density) %>%
    rename(population_median_density = median_density)
  
  plot_data <- trait_data %>%
    left_join(trait_baseline, by = "chr_num") %>%
    mutate(
      fold_enrichment = mean_density / population_median_density,
      absolute_diff = mean_density - population_median_density,
      is_significant = !is.na(population_median_density) & fold_enrichment > 2 & absolute_diff > 1
    )
  
  cat(sprintf("\n=== %s: Chr Impact Plot Data ===\n", trait_label))
  print(plot_data %>% select(chr, n_genes, mean_density, population_median_density, fold_enrichment, is_significant))
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = reorder(chr, -n_genes))) +
    # Mean density of removed genes (main bars)
    geom_col(aes(y = mean_density, fill = n_genes), 
             color = "black", size = 0.3, alpha = 0.85, width = 0.7) +
    # Chromosome median density as thick horizontal lines (baseline)
    geom_segment(data = plot_data %>% filter(!is.na(population_median_density)),
                 aes(x = as.numeric(factor(reorder(chr, -n_genes))) - 0.4,
                     xend = as.numeric(factor(reorder(chr, -n_genes))) + 0.4,
                     y = population_median_density,
                     yend = population_median_density),
                 color = "black", size = 2, lineend = "butt") +
    # Gene count labels
    geom_text(aes(y = mean_density, label = n_genes), 
              vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "skyblue", high = "salmon4",
                        name = "Genes\nRemoved") +
    labs(
      title = sprintf("Chromosomal Impact: %s", trait_label),
      subtitle = "Colored bars = mean density of removed genes | Black lines = chromosome baseline\nTop 15 chromosomes by number of removed genes",
      x = "Chromosome",
      y = "CAAS Density (% per 100 AA)",
      caption = paste0(
        "Bars = mean CAAS density of genes REMOVED by filtering (Extreme and Dubious). ",
        "Black lines = chromosome median density (baseline). A large gap between a bar \nand its line indicates that removed genes are much denser than typical genes on that chromosome. ",
        "\nThis plot helps validate whether filtering disproportionately \naffects specific chromosomes or reflects true outliers."
      )
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0, face = "italic"),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  # Add significance asterisks (no brackets)
  if (any(plot_data$is_significant, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    sig_data <- plot_data %>%
      filter(is_significant) %>%
      mutate(
        x_pos = as.numeric(factor(reorder(chr, -n_genes))),
        y_pos = mean_density * 1.05
      )
    
    cat(sprintf("=== %s: Significant chromosomes (n=%d) ===\n", trait_label, nrow(sig_data)))
    print(sig_data %>% select(chr, mean_density, population_median_density, fold_enrichment))
    
    p <- p + geom_text(data = sig_data,
                       aes(x = x_pos, y = y_pos + 0.5, label = "*"),
                       vjust = 0, size = 6, fontface = "bold", color = "black")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create plots for both traits
p_chr_impact_malignant <- create_chr_impact_plot("malignant_prevalence", "Malignant Prevalence")
p_chr_impact_neoplasia <- create_chr_impact_plot("neoplasia_prevalence", "Neoplasia Prevalence")

print(p_chr_impact_malignant)
print(p_chr_impact_neoplasia)

# Save plots
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(removed_dir, "chromosomal_impact_malignant_prevalence.png"),
  plot = p_chr_impact_malignant,
  width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 320, dev = "png"
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(removed_dir, "chromosomal_impact_neoplasia_prevalence.png"),
  plot = p_chr_impact_neoplasia,
  width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 320, dev = "png"
)

```

## 9. BG cleanup

Now that we have the declustered datasets, we can also create cleaned-up background datasets by removing the same genes/positions from the original background CAAS data.

```{r bg_cleanup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, dev='png', dpi=320}
# We will be using all_removed_genes from above in order to remove same genes from background CAAS data
cat("\n=== Background CAAS Cleanup ===\n")
# First load original background CAAS data
bg_dir <- file.path(resultsDir, "2.CAAS/1.Discovery/2.CAAS_background")

bg_caas_files <- list.files(
  path = bg_dir,
  pattern = "global_background",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE
)

# Load background CAAS data
bg_caas_dfs <- lapply(bg_caas_files, function(file) {
  trait_name <- ifelse(grepl("malignant_prevalence", file), "malignant_prevalence", "neoplasia_prevalence")
  df <- read_tsv(file, col_names = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Gene = X1) %>%
    mutate(Trait = trait_name)
  return(df)
})

# Name the list elements
names(bg_caas_dfs) <- sapply(bg_caas_files, function(file) {
  trait_name <- ifelse(grepl("malignant_prevalence", file), "malignant_prevalence", "neoplasia_prevalence")
  return(paste0("bg_caas_", trait_name))
})

# Clean background CAAS data by removing same genes/positions as in all_removed_genes (by Trait)
clean_bg_caas <- function(trait_name) {
  bg_key <- paste0("bg_caas_", trait_name)
  if (!bg_key %in% names(bg_caas_dfs)) {
    stop("No background CAAS dataset found for trait: ", trait_name)
  }
  if (!is.data.frame(all_removed_genes)) {
    stop("all_removed_genes is not a data.frame/tibble. Actual class: ",
         paste(class(all_removed_genes), collapse = ", "))
  }

  # Required columns check (prevents silent fallback to env variables)
  needed_cols <- c("Trait", "Gene")

  bg_df <- bg_caas_dfs[[bg_key]]

  removed_pairs <- all_removed_genes %>%
    filter(.data$Trait == trait_name) %>%
    distinct(.data$Gene)

  cleaned_df <- bg_df %>%
    anti_join(removed_pairs, by = "Gene")

  cleaned_df
}

cleaned_bg_malignant <- clean_bg_caas("malignant_prevalence")
cleaned_bg_neoplasia <- clean_bg_caas("neoplasia_prevalence")

# Rewrite the gene lists to files
write.table(
  cleaned_bg_malignant$Gene,
  file.path(bg_dir, "malignant_prevalence/cleaned_background_malignant_prevalence.txt"),
  col.names = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE,
  sep = "\n"
)

write.table(
  cleaned_bg_neoplasia$Gene,
  file.path(bg_dir, "neoplasia_prevalence/cleaned_background_neoplasia_prevalence.txt"),
  col.names = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE,
  sep = "\n"
)

```

## Session Information

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
